case_title: BELISLE OSCAR VS KAMPA LARRY V

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BELISLE OSCAR AS TO DEFENDANT KAMPA LARRY V ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

UNABLE TO SERVE LARRY KAMPA AFTER VARIOUS ATTEMPTS.
